title: cnidium apioides subsp. orientale
intro: Cnidium apioides subsp. orientale, also known as Cnidium fruit or Cnidium seed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cnidium apioides subsp. orientale include pain relief, improved circulation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Cnidium seed is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, capsules, or topical creams, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
